description_long: This object is a group of rustic wooden cabins arranged in a row, each with a prominent gable roof and a shared front porch area. The cabins are set on a landscaped plot with defined walkways, a central paved area, and a secondary structure to one side. The roofs are dark brown and steeply pitched, with visible overhangs and exposed rafters, giving a traditional lodge-like appearance. Multiple windows and doors are symmetrically distributed along the front facades, enhancing the inviting, communal feel. The surrounding grounds feature grass, stone paths, and a large paved courtyard, suggesting a recreational or residential complex. The overall setting evokes a cozy, natural retreat within an organized urban or park environment.
description: A cluster of rustic wooden cabins with gable roofs, set on landscaped grounds with walkways and a central courtyard. The cabins feature symmetrical windows, doors, and a shared front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the row of cabins with gable roofs, a shared porch, and the main entrance paths leading up from a large paved courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabins, the overhanging roofs, and the layout of the landscaped grounds with paths and a secondary structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cabins, the alignment of the buildings, and the expanse of the courtyard and green space in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cabins' side elevations, the arrangement of walkways, and the relationship between the main and secondary structures.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs and dark asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically distributed along the front facades of each cabin, forming a regular and balanced pattern.
attribute_door_placement: Single doors centered on the front facade of each cabin, aligned with the porch and main walkways.
